formulas.description: W:连接权重，A:源激活，S:扩散强度

formulas.description: Φ:整合信息量，越大越有意识

formulas.name: 因果涌现
formulas.formula: CE = MI(cause | cut) - MI(cause | no cut)

formulas.name: 预测编码自由能

formulas.name: 预测误差

formulas.name: 情绪混合模型
formulas.formula: E_mixed = Σ_i w_i · E_i, Σ w_i = 1

formulas.name: 社会影响模型（French-Harary）
formulas.formula: x_i = x_i(t) + λ Σ_j w_{ij} (x_j(t) - x_i(t))

formulas.name: FitzHugh-Nagumo 模型
formulas.formula: dv/dt = v - v³/3 - w + I, dw/dt = (v + a - bw)/τ

formulas.name: 脉冲时间依赖可塑性（STDP）
formulas.formula: Δw = A_+ e^{-Δt/τ_+} if Δt>0, Δw = -A_- e^{Δt/τ_-} if Δt<0

formulas.name: 脑网络模块度

formulas.name: Gamma(x+1) 泰勒展开
formulas.formula: x**5*(-EulerGamma*pi**4/160 - pi**2*zeta(3)/36 - zeta(5)/5 - EulerGamma**2*zeta(3)/6 - EulerGamma**3*pi**2/72 - EulerGamma**5/120) + x**4*(EulerGamma**4/24 + EulerGamma**2*pi**2/24 + EulerGamma*zeta(3)/3 + pi**4/160) + x**3*(-EulerGamma*pi**2/12 - zeta(3)/3 - EulerGamma**3/6) + x**2*(EulerGamma**2/2 + pi**2/12) - EulerGamma*x + 1

formulas.formula: int sin(x^2) dx = sqrt(pi/2) S(sqrt(2/pi) x)

formulas.name: Fresnel C
formulas.formula: int cos(x^2) dx = sqrt(pi/2) C(sqrt(2/pi) x)

formulas.name: Dirac equation
formulas.formula: i gamma^mu partial_mu psi - m psi = 0

formulas.name: Hamilton principle
formulas.formula: delta int L(q, q', t) dt = 0

formulas.name: Riemann tensor
formulas.formula: R^rho_{sigma mu nu} = partial_mu Gamma^rho_{nu sigma} - partial_nu Gamma^rho_{mu sigma} + ...

formulas.name: Stokes theorem
formulas.formula: int_{partial Omega} omega = int_Omega d omega

formulas.name: 前景理论
formulas.formula: v(x) = x^α if x≥0, -λ*(-x)^β if x<0

formulas.name: 强化学习

formulas.name: 球谐函数

不完全椭圆积分第三类

formulas.name: Skyrmion 拓扑数

formulas.name: 弦理论

formulas.name: Kitaev 链
formulas.formula: H = -μ Σ_j c†_j c_j - t Σ_j (c†_j c_{j+1} + h.c.) + Δ Σ_j c_j c_{j+1} + h.c.

formulas.name: 分形子
formulas.formula: H = Σ_{⟨ij⟩} Z_i Z_j + Σ_{⟨⟨ij⟩⟩} X_i X_j

formulas.name: 群场论

formulas.name: 量子黎曼几何
formulas.formula: ds² = g_{μν} dx^μ dx^ν, [g_{μν}(x), π^{ρσ}(y)] = i δ^{ρσ}_{μν} δ(x-y)

formulas.name: 多重宇宙
formulas.formula: S = Σ_i S_i, S_i = action of universe i

formulas.name: 修改引力
formulas.formula: f(R) = R + α R² + β R_{μν} R^{μν}

formulas.name: Shor 周期查找
formulas.formula: f(x) = aˣ mod N, period r: aʳ ≡ 1 mod N

formulas.name: QAOA 代价哈密顿量
